ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., gasoline, diesel, hybrid) */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual, semi-automatic) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, van) */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle model was first produced */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle model ceased production */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the vehicle record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency" (
  "fuel_efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "city_mpg" REAL /* City fuel efficiency in miles per gallon */,
  "highway_mpg" REAL /* Highway fuel efficiency in miles per gallon */,
  "combined_mpg" REAL /* Combined fuel efficiency in miles per gallon */,
  "fuel_efficiency_test_method" TEXT /* Method used to test fuel efficiency */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the fuel efficiency was tested */,
  "test_facility" TEXT /* Facility where the test was conducted */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiency_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emissions_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emissions record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "co2" REAL /* CO2 emissions in grams per mile */,
  "ghg_score" REAL /* Greenhouse gas score */,
  "smog_rating" REAL /* Smog rating */,
  "emissions_test_method" TEXT /* Method used to test emissions */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the emissions were tested */,
  "test_facility" TEXT /* Facility where the test was conducted */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emissions_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_characteristics" (
  "engine_characteristics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine characteristics record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Engine size in liters */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower */,
  "engine_displacement" REAL /* Displacement of the engine in cubic centimeters */,
  "engine_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the engine (e.g., V6, I4) */,
  "valves_per_cylinder" INTEGER /* Number of valves per cylinder */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the engine */,
  "turbocharged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the engine is turbocharged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_characteristics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_characteristics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_characteristics" (
  "transmission_characteristics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission characteristics record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "gears" INTEGER /* Number of gears */,
  "transmission_rpm" TEXT /* RPM range of the transmission */,
  "transmission_torque" REAL /* Torque capacity of the transmission */,
  "transmission_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_characteristics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_characteristics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_characteristics" (
  "fuel_characteristics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel characteristics record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel */,
  "octane_rating" REAL /* Octane rating */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in gallons */,
  "fuel_injection_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel injection system (e.g., direct injection, port injection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_characteristics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_characteristics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drive_type" (
  "drive_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive type record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., Rear-Wheel Drive, Front-Wheel Drive) */,
  "drive_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the drive type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drive_type_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "range" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each range record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "city_range" REAL /* City range in miles */,
  "highway_range" REAL /* Highway range in miles */,
  "combined_range" REAL /* Combined range in miles */,
  "electric_range" REAL /* Electric range in miles for hybrid or electric vehicles */,
  "fuel_range" REAL /* Fuel range in miles for non-electric vehicles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_range_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser and operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "website" TEXT /* Manufacturer's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "year_description" TEXT /* Description or context for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)
